'''ranazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:moab|moab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moab|moab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ranazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rænæzhæth|rænæzhæth]] || [[word:rænæzhæj|rænæzhæj]] || [[word:rænæzhæsh|rænæzhæsh]] || [[word:rænæzhæ|rænæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rananazhath|rananazhath]] || [[word:rananazhaj|rananazhaj]] || [[word:rananazhash|rananazhash]] || [[word:rananazha|rananazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranazhath|ranazhath]] || [[word:ranazhaj|ranazhaj]] || [[word:ranazhash|ranazhash]] || [[word:ranazha|ranazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranafzhath|ranafzhath]] || [[word:ranafzhaj|ranafzhaj]] || [[word:ranafzhash|ranafzhash]] || [[word:ranafzhaf|ranafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ranazhatha|ranazhatha]] || [[word:ranazhaja|ranazhaja]] || [[word:ranazhasha|ranazhasha]] || [[word:ranazhaka|ranazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ranazhath|ranazhath]] || [[word:ranazhaj|ranazhaj]] || [[word:ranazhash|ranazhash]] || [[word:ranazha|ranazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ranazhathal|ranazhathal]] || [[word:ranazhajal|ranazhajal]] || [[word:ranazhashal|ranazhashal]] || [[word:ranazhakal|ranazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ranazhathatha|ranazhathatha]] || [[word:ranazhajaja|ranazhajaja]] || [[word:ranazhashasha|ranazhashasha]] || [[word:ranazhaka|ranazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ranazhathan|ranazhathan]] || [[word:ranazhajan|ranazhajan]] || [[word:ranazhashan|ranazhashan]] || [[word:ranazhakan|ranazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ranazhathaoro|ranazhathaoro]] || [[word:ranazhajaoro|ranazhajaoro]] || [[word:ranazhashaoro|ranazhashaoro]] || [[word:ranazhakaoro|ranazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
